assertion_results.text: Step 8 Case A creates standard remediation tasks for the current stream (rhtpa-2.2) with standard labels ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123'] and 'Depend' link to TC-8020
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Task 1 (Upstream Backport) has Labels: ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123 and Link: 'Depend on TC-8020'. Task 2 (Downstream Propagation) has the same labels and 'Depend on TC-8020'. Both tasks are scoped to stream rhtpa-2.2 under the 'Case A' heading.

assertion_results.text: Step 8 Case B detects that stream rhtpa-2.1 is also affected but has no CVE Jira — creates proactive preemptive remediation tasks (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md states 'Case B: Cross-stream impact — create preemptive remediation tasks for stream rhtpa-2.1 (no CVE Jira exists)'. cross-stream.md confirms 'Stream rhtpa-2.1 does not have its own CVE Jira for CVE-2026-55123. Preemptive remediation tasks have been created'. Tasks 3 and 4 are created as preemptive tasks for rhtpa-2.1.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks for stream rhtpa-2.1 include the 'security-preemptive' label alongside standard labels: ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123', 'security-preemptive']
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Task 3 labels: 'ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123, security-preemptive'. Task 4 labels: 'ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123, security-preemptive'. Also confirmed in cross-stream.md preemptive tasks table showing all four labels for both tasks.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks are linked to the originating CVE Jira TC-8020 with 'Related' link type (not 'Depend') because the originating CVE belongs to a different stream
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Task 3: 'Related to TC-8020 (not Depend — originating CVE belongs to a different stream)'. Task 4: 'Related to TC-8020'. cross-stream.md explicitly states: 'Both preemptive tasks are linked to TC-8020 with link type Related (not Depend) because the originating CVE Jira belongs to stream rhtpa-2.2, not rhtpa-2.1'.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive task descriptions include a preemptive remediation prefix noting TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2) as the originating CVE
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Task 3 description begins with: '> **Preemptive remediation**: This task was created proactively from cross-stream impact analysis of TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2).' Task 4 has the identical prefix. Both explicitly name TC-8020 and stream rhtpa-2.2 as the originating CVE context.
